About.title: EXPERIENCE
About.role: ROLE: Fullstack Developer. Stack: React / Next.js / TypeScript / Node.js.
About.e2e: END-TO-END: High-performance SaaS, MVP, and business logic development. Integrations: AmoCRM, YooKassa, Robokassa.
About.frontend: FRONTEND: SPA/SSR architecture. Advanced UI/UX systems, custom animations, and WebGL/3D (React Three Fiber).
About.backend: BACKEND: Relational & NoSQL database schema design. Async process optimization (workers, webhooks, data parsing).
About.devops: INFRASTRUCTURE: Containerization (Docker), web servers (Nginx), process management (PM2), and SSL certification.

About-tab.title: CAT SYSTEM_CORE_PROFILE.MD --VERBOSE
About-tab.overview_text: 3.5 years of commercial Fullstack experience. Specializing in e2e-delivery of complex product features, high-performance SaaS scaling, e-commerce platforms, and deep Telegram ecosystem integration (Mini Apps / Bots). Focused on building resilient backend cores and securing web infrastructure.
About-tab.workflow_text_1: ► System Design: Prioritize transactional safety at the database level (PostgreSQL/RPC), strict resource control (RLS/ACL policies), and building custom messaging engines to route traffic across concurrent microservices.
About-tab.workflow_text_2: ► Deployment & Infrastructure: Experienced in deploying automation via self-hosted configurations (Docker, Coolify) and isolating bare-metal production environments via SSH. Ensure system fault tolerance using PM2 process persistence.
About-tab.ai_text_1: ► Development Co-processor: Leverage advanced LLMs to bootstrap boilerplate code, generate configuration assets, and significantly speed up initial prototyping during setup routines.
About-tab.ai_text_2: ► Telemetry Parsing: Utilize AI as a utility tool for auditing heavy log outputs and tracking runtime anomalies. Core architecture design, security audits, and complex SQL query optimization remain strictly manual tasks.
About-tab.hobby_text_1: ► Secure Routing: Manage a home network stack utilizing custom-configured VPN tunnels and routing gateways to eliminate environment network overlap and ensure stable access.
About-tab.hobby_text_2: ► Self-Hosted Ecosystems: Maintain dedicated local media repositories (Jellyfin) and microservices in isolated Docker containers with automated backup and storage optimization.
About-tab.edu_text: ► VSUET - Information Systems and Programming (Vocational Degree). Foundational knowledge in computer science, software engineering core standards, and algorithmic layout (Graduated 2023).

t-catalog-admin.title: T-Catalog - Management Dashboard
t-catalog-admin.shortDesc: Multi-tenant ERP/CRM platform with visual business logic programming engines.
t-catalog-admin.fullDesc: An administrative console for marketplace orchestrators. Built a visual workflow node builder (event-driven checkout modal sequences, conditional logic triggers, custom package exchange rules). Integrated advanced SKU modification matrices for apparel (size grids, height, color variants with independent stock tracking), legal onboarding workflows (KYC entity validation via tax numbers), custom status managers, and automated SMTP routing.

features.0: Visual workflow builder managing sequential conditional logic and custom checkout checkout steps
features.1: Multi-attribute SKU variation matrices handling size grids, height, and independent inventory limits
features.2: Granular promotional coupon engine supporting multi-level usage caps and specific order thresholds

t-catalog-client.title: T-Catalog - Storefront Application
t-catalog-client.shortDesc: High-performance E-commerce client running as a Telegram Mini App.
t-catalog-client.fullDesc: A storefront application fully optimized for embedded runtime constraints. Dynamically parses and renders structural JSON node sequences generated by the admin's visual logic builder (handling custom container deposit logic and dynamic checklist prompts). Supports instant processing of complex product variations, database-level coupon validation, and native Telegram UI elements.

features.0: Dynamic client-side parsing of conditional checkout workflows configured via the visual node builder
features.1: Integration of multi-attribute variation filters matched with database-level pricing snapshots
features.2: Context-aware routing seamlessly mapped to native Telegram UI (BackButton, openLink)

rulme-admin.title: Rulme - Operator Console
rulme-admin.shortDesc: Administrative command center for dispatching automotive service marketplace requests.
rulme-admin.fullDesc: A real-time dispatch dashboard monitoring active pipelines and managing service listings. Designed with a dedicated capture view for partial or unsubmitted application forms. Aggregates live transaction logs, master registration records, and allows operators to audit financial flows without delay.

features.0: Incomplete form intercept layout designed to recover drop-off leads at early funnel stages
features.1: Centralized messaging engine dispatching telemetry payloads across a multi-bot system
features.2: Analytical tracking layer for user segment classification and telemetry access logs

rulme-client.title: Rulme - Customer Interface
rulme-client.shortDesc: Telegram Mini App automotive marketplace with integrated conversion tracking loops.
rulme-client.fullDesc: An interactive vehicle repair matching app. Implemented a multi-step checkout with implicit background payload tracking: the system captures user contacts at stage one and logs details if the vehicle specification stage is abandoned. Monitors active carts to catch and display unsubmitted 24-hour-old requests.

features.0: Multi-stage checkout with silent background state caching to capture partial leads
features.1: Automatic session classification indexing idle users and aging incomplete carts
features.2: Custom-built Media Viewer for order attachments with real-time API-level ACL validation

bitovki36.title: Bitovki 36 - Corporate CRM
bitovki36.shortDesc: Enterprise logistics management framework for industrial supply chains.
bitovki36.fullDesc: Internal operational platform handling storage audits, automated contract logic, and inventory flows. Built a complete amoCRM data integration layer entirely via API reverse-engineering. Deployed the application into an isolated local network loop featuring automated SSL rotation routines.

features.0: Two-way asset synchronization and webhook ingestion mapping undocumented amoCRM endpoints
features.1: System-level process persistence recovering software runtime state under 1 minute via PM2
features.2: Standalone Certbot SSL configuration over restricted port channels using DNS challenges
